texto: I hope that's a good thing,' I said, thinking he might say I reminded him of a film star- then we'd actually have something in common. I was hoping for Anne Hathaway or Julia Roberts, and not the obvious Vivien Leigh. Even Angelina Jolie would have done, though I'd never quite forgiven her for stealing Brad's heart. Talking of Brad, was Sean starting to resemble him too? No, he could never be a Brad, a Matthew McConaughey maybe at a push, but never a Brad Pitt.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ali McNamara que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “I hope that's a good thing,' I said, thinking he might say I reminded him of a film star- then we…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, humor, movies, com foco em movies.

Talking of Brad, was Sean starting to resemble him too? No, he could never be a Brad, a Matthew McConaughey maybe at a push, but never a Brad Pitt.

texto: Oh God, my stomach must have won a medal- it's doing a lap of honour now.
